title: AWS for Startups - Amazon Web Services (AWS)
search_path_label: 采购 / 招投标 / Marketplace 路径
full_text:
AWS Startups
Home
AWS Credits
AI for Startups
Offers
Migrate
More
Build your startup on AWS
The majority of the top 100 startups globally use AI services on AWS. Get up to $200,000 in AWS Activate Credits and expert support to build what's next.
Join now
Play
What’s new
The latest from AWS for Startups.
Loading
Loading
Loading
Loading
Loading
Home to over 350,000 startups globally
With nearly 20 years of experience gained from supporting hundreds of thousands of startups that have come before, AWS helps founders prove that their world-changing ideas are possible, at any stage of growth or level of funding. Whether your startup is just starting to ideate an MVP or is on track for an IPO, AWS offers a broad range of programs and resources that will support you to reach your next milestone.
Innovation powered by AWS
Millions of customers, including thousands of the fastest-growing startups, use AWS to build fast, keep costs low and prove what is possible.
Expertise from our startup network
AWS for Startups comprises former founders and CTOs, venture capitalists, angel investors, and mentors who help today's founders navigate challenges and opportunities.
Programs and resources to empower success
From your first line of code to your millionth customer, AWS for Startups provides the technical guidance, business mentorship, and go-to-market resources to help you reach your next milestone.
Credits to help you test and build
Apply to receive up to $200,000 in AWS Activate Credits to offset costs on infrastructure, data services, and AI/ML models. Credits are redeemable on third-party models on Amazon Bedrock. AI startups ready to grow may be eligible for additional credits beyond Activate.
Your go-to-market support
Co-build, co-market, and co-sell with AWS to accelerate your growth. The AWS Partner Network has more than 140,000 partners from over 200 countries, with 70% headquartered outside of the United States.
The technology behind the fastest-growing startups
With AWS, founders leverage the latest cloud and AI technologies to experiment and innovate faster. Accelerate your time from idea to revenue with the broadest and deepest set of services on the most secure cloud.
AWS Startups: Made in New York, powered by AWS
Discover why New York City’s speed and energy is a launchpad for startups building the future with AWS. In this video, five trailblazing founders share their experiences scaling fast-growing companies in America's cultural capital.
Play
Support at every stage
1. Turn your idea into a business
You have a big idea that solves a problem, now make it real. Explore articles, videos, and resources built for early-stage founders. Then bring your idea to AWS Startup Advisor and get a personalized support tailored to what you're building.
Learn | Start building with AWS Startup Advisor
2. Build your minimum viable product
Focus on shipping, not infrastructure. AWS Startup Advisor helps you scaffold your architecture and deploy local code to AWS, right from your IDE. Get up to $200,000 in AWS Activate Credits, with additional credits available for AI startups ready to scale.
Apply now
3. Extend your reach
Put your product in front of the customers already buying on AWS. List on AWS Marketplace to reach enterprise buyers and shorten your sales cycle.
Learn more | Visit AWS Marketplace
4. Reach your next milestone
Whether it's your next funding round, your first enterprise customer, or your next hundred users, tap into mentorship, go-to-market resources, and investor connections through the AWS for Startups.
Get started
Access credits for every stage
From first prototype to Series A and beyond. Credits that scale with you.
Learn More
Build and deploy faster with Kiro credits designed for startups
Apply today
Startups
Fuel your startup’s growth with up to $200,000 in AWS Activate Credits
Apply today
Did you find what you were looking for today?
Let us know so we can improve the quality of the content on our pages
Yes
No
